category_sources: source_facts.description says sendEmail is an email program for sending SMTP mail.
source_facts.homepage points to the official SendEmail software page.
display_name_sources: Official homepage path and project page use SendEmail.
source_facts.executables uses the stylized command name sendEmail.
docs_sources: Official SendEmail homepage is the best available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive do not identify an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports email and SMTP tags.
